name: testGetWaitScopeSignalTransitionTime
title: testGetWaitScopeSignalTransitionTime
syntax: long testGetWaitScopeSignalTransitionTime (message aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword flags, long thresholdStart, long thresholdEnd, ScopeBitTransitionTimeResult result, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 1

long testGetWaitScopeSignalTransitionTime (char nodeName[], dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword flags, long thresholdStart, long thresholdEnd, ScopeBitTransitionTimeResult result, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 2

long testGetWaitScopeSignalTransitionTime (linFrame aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword flags, long thresholdStart, long thresholdEnd, ScopeBitTransitionTimeResult result, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 3

long testGetWaitScopeSignalTransitionTime (frFrame aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword flags, long thresholdStart, long thresholdEnd, ScopeBitTransitionTimeResult result, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 4
description: Form 1: Measures the transition time of rising and falling edges of a CAN message within the defined area.
Form 2: Measures the transition time of rising and falling edges of all Tx messages of an ECU node within the defined area.
Form 3: Measures the transition time of rising and falling edges of a LIN message within the defined area.
Form 4: Measures the transition time of rising and falling edges of a FlexRay message within the defined area.

parameters.name: nodeName
parameters.description: The ECU node name of a database node.

parameters.name: msgFieldStart, msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: The start and end of the transition time measurement. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin
Define threshold level unit:0 = Threshold level in mV1 = Threshold level in %
Select signal for transition time measurementOnly one of the three bits must be set (only valid for CAN)Bit 1 = 1 Use CANhigh Bit 2 = 1 Use CANLow Bit 3 = 1 Use CANdiff
Rising/falling edge selection Bit 4 = 1 Use rising edgesBit 5 = 1 Use falling edges

0 = Use last occurrence for transition time measurement, where the voltage level is above or below the threshold level. 1 = Use first occurrence for transition time measurement, where the voltage level is above or below the threshold level.

parameters.name: averageValue
parameters.type: The average transition time overall measured edges

parameters.name: stdDeviation
parameters.type: The standard deviation of the transition time measurement

parameters.name: scopeSamplingPeriod
parameters.type: The configured sample period of the scope device

return: Select signal for transition time measurementOnly one of the three bits must be
availability: Scope CAN (since 8.5 SP3) LIN (since 9.0 SP4) FlexRay (since 11.0)
Scope CAN (since 2.0 SP2) LIN (since 2.1 SP4) FlexRay (since 3.0)
